roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: DA MTR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE SAMUEL K, FENG IN DEPT, 13/TN: ROBERT CHRISTOPHER PORTER/AKA: DENNIS SMITH/X: AS PART OF A NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION,THE PEOPLE MOVE TO TERMINATE THE PROBATION IN THIS CASE PURSUANT TO PC 1385 WITH THE CONDITION THAT THE DEFENDANT ENTERS A HARVEY WAIVER AS TO STAY WAY ORDERS AND ANY RESTITUTION OWED FROM THIS CASE,/MO GRTD/X: THE DEFENDANT ENTERS A HARVEY WAIVER WITH FOLLOWING THE CONDITIONS:/CTORD: STAY WAY ORDER(S) AND ANY RESTITUTION OWED FROM CASE #17018738 MAY BE ADDED AS TERMS AND CONDITIONS TO THE SENTENCING IN CASE # 18002528/CTORD: PROBATION IN #17018738 IS HEREBY TERMINATED AS UNSUCCESSFUL/
